# verification_catalog module constants
DATA_CONTRACT_MIN_PATTERNS = 3
DETECTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS = 5
EVIDENCE_MIN_PATTERNS = 3
HAPPY_PATH_MIN_PATTERNS = 2
LARGE_REPO_FILE_THRESHOLD = 1000
MAX_CATALOG_ENTRIES = 10
MIN_CROSS_LAYER_PATTERNS = 3
SIDE_EFFECT_MIN_PATTERNS = 3

# verification_catalog public function / class signatures
check_verification_installed(entry: Dict[str, Any], project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> bool
detect_cross_layer_consistency(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_data_contract_verification(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_evidence_verification(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_happy_path_test_gap(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_iac_project(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_side_effect_verification(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
detect_verification_needs(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
get_rule_template(entry: Dict[str, Any], project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> str
